codeReview.summary: The implementation fixes the Settings null-profile crash path (.maybeSingle()) and switches profile/platform saves to upsert, and the posts.pillar CHECK constraint is removed in db/schema.sql. However, the required creator_profile.bio column from the feature contract is not present, so the feature is not fully implemented as specified.

issues.description: Feature spec requires creator_profile to include a bio column, but the table defines bio_facts/voice_* fields instead and no bio column exists. This does not fully satisfy the feature description and expected schema shape.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fullstack-worker procedure requires agent-browser/manual verification for UI-facing changes, but this worker transcript contains no agent-browser invocation or interactive checks while skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 6). Transcript skeleton for session a82445f1-2e23-4130-b1a1-6b87d4fe070e shows build/lint and file reads/edits only, no agent-browser/manual verification steps.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS.md says all DB mutations should go through API routes, but this feature directly mutates creator_profile from a client component. This suggests either an enforced convention violation pattern or that the convention needs explicit exceptions/updates.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md Data Access section vs commit 5a6be9e settings page direct calls: content-os/src/app/(dashboard)/settings/page.tsx lines ~399-429 (.from("creator_profile").upsert(...)).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Schema source of truth appears ambiguous: both db/schema.sql and src/lib/schema.sql exist. Worker had to inspect both during implementation, indicating shared-state docs may need an explicit canonical-schema note to reduce drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton includes Read on /db/schema.sql and /src/lib/schema.sql; repository contains both files (content-os/db/schema.sql and content-os/src/lib/schema.sql).

summary: Review failed due to a blocking schema mismatch: creator_profile.bio was required but not added. Null-profile handling and pillar CHECK removal were implemented, but the feature is incomplete against its declared schema contract.
